headline: ABC's Summer Gameshow Blitz: Nostalgic Hits Return with Star Power
lede: ABC is doubling down on familiar favorites this summer, bringing back three beloved game shows that promise to inject high-energy entertainment into viewers' living rooms.
body:
Network programmers at ABC have crafted a summer strategy that leans heavily into nostalgic, star-powered game show formats. The lineup features Steve Harvey's raucous *Celebrity Family Feud*, Elizabeth Banks' high-octane *Press Your Luck*, and Jimmy Kimmel's reimagined *Who Wants to Be a Millionaire*.

These tentpole unscripted series represent a calculated bet on audience comfort and recognition. Harvey's charismatic hosting style continues to drive *Family Feud* ratings, while Banks has successfully modernized the classic *Press Your Luck* format with contemporary production values and engaging celebrity contestants.

Kimmel's *Millionaire* approach adds a winking, meta-commentary layer to the classic quiz show template. By inserting his signature comedic sensibility, the late-night host transforms the traditional game show framework into something more self-aware and playful.

The summer schedule suggests ABC understands that viewers seek familiar, low-stakes entertainment during warmer months. These shows require minimal emotional investment while delivering consistent, laugh-filled entertainment.
key_facts: Three game shows returning in July
